title: Serving Dishes & Platters Compartment Trays with 5 Sections, 4 Pack Serving Platters for Parties, Reusable Plastic Snack Tray Serving Trays for Snacks Fruit Candies Dessert Nibbles Nuts
features: 5 COMPARTMENT DESIGN: Multi compartment serving platter is 5 compartments compartment design, large capacity, one compartment holds one kind of food, convenient to store a variety of food without cascading flavour, both beautiful and clean and hygienic.
SAFE & HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL: The compartment snack tray is made of high quality PP material, clean and hygienic, non-toxic and odorless, easy to clean, can be reused many times.

MULTIPURPOSE DINING PLATTER: The compartment snack tray can be used to hold a variety of fruits, desserts biscuits, snacks, nuts, to entertain guests, ,it is the ideal choice of multi compartment snack tray for families.

FINE WORKMANSHIP & STURDY DESIGN: The serving trays have a smooth surface, the edges are finely polished and not rough, the bottom wear-resistant design does not move when picking up food, it will not be easily broken.
GREAT FAMILY SERVING TRAYS: The serving platter is great for entertaining guests or for after-dinner fruit, afternoon tea and desserts, enjoying delicious food as a family or with friends!
description: Characteristic: 1. This compartmentalization ensures each snack retains its freshness and original flavor, preventing any unwanted taste mingling between different foods. 2. Our snack tray features a smart multi-compartment design, allowing you to carry a variety of snacks simultaneously, such as nuts, chocolates, dried fruits, and vegetable chips. 3. Beyond being your ideal travel companion, the compartmentalized snack tray is perfect for office, school, camping, picnics, and family use. Conveniently carry and enjoy your snacks on various occasions, satisfying your and your family's or friends' cravings for delightful munchies. Specification: Material: High quality PP Size: 24.5*3cm Color: Pink & Blue Package: 4 Pack Compartment Trays with 5 Sections
